plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Manage tasks, plan your day, and build up memory of important context about your work. Syncs with your calendar, email, and chat to keep everything organized and on track.

plugins.name: enterprise-search
plugins.description: Search across all of your company's tools in one place. Find anything across email, chat, documents, and wikis without switching between apps.

plugins.name: cowork-plugin-management
plugins.description: Create, customize, and manage plugins tailored to your organization's tools and workflows. Configure MCP servers, adjust plugin behavior, and adapt templates to match how your team works.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Prospect, craft outreach, and build deal strategy faster. Prep for calls, manage your pipeline, and write personalized messaging that moves deals forward.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Streamline finance and accounting workflows, from journal entries and reconciliation to financial statements and variance analysis. Speed up audit prep, month-end close, and keeping your books clean.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Write SQL, explore datasets, and generate insights faster. Build visualizations and dashboards, and turn raw data into clear stories for stakeholders.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Speed up contract review, NDA triage, and compliance workflows for in-house legal teams. Draft legal briefs, organize precedent research, and manage institutional knowledge.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Create content, plan campaigns, and analyze performance across marketing channels. Maintain brand voice consistency, track competitors, and report on what's working.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, escalate issues, and build your knowledge base. Research customer context and turn resolved issues into self-service content.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, and synthesize user research faster. Keep stakeholders updated and stay ahead of the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: bio-research
plugins.description: Connect to preclinical research tools and databases (literature search, genomics analysis, target prioritization) to accelerate early-stage life sciences R&D.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Streamline engineering workflows — standups, code review, architecture decisions, incident response, and technical documentation. Works with your existing tools or standalone.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Streamline people operations — recruiting, onboarding, performance reviews, compensation analysis, and policy guidance. Maintain compliance and keep your team running smoothly.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Accelerate design workflows — critique, design system management, UX writing, accessibility audits, research synthesis, and dev handoff. From exploration to pixel-perfect specs.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Optimize business operations — vendor management, process documentation, change management, capacity planning, and compliance tracking. Keep your organization running efficiently.

plugins.name: small-business
plugins.description: Pre-built small business workflows (including payroll planning, month-end close, weekly briefs, and growth campaigns) using your QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Docusign, Gsuite, O365, Canva, and other connected tools. You approve every step that touches money or customers.

plugins.name: pdf-viewer
plugins.description: View, annotate, and sign PDFs in a live interactive viewer. Mark up contracts, fill forms with visual feedback, stamp approvals, and place signatures — then download the annotated copy.

plugins.name: apollo
plugins.description: 3 pre-built skills that chain multiple Apollo APIs into complete sales workflows — no manual steps, no tab switching. Enrich any contact from a name, email, or LinkedIn URL. Prospect by describing your ICP in plain English and get ranked leads. Find, enrich, and load contacts into a sequence in one shot.

plugins.name: brand-voice
plugins.description: Brand Voice transforms scattered brand materials into enforceable AI guardrails — automatically. It searches across Lark Wiki, Lark Drive, Lark Wiki, Gong, Lark IM, and meeting transcripts to distill your strongest brand signals into a single source of truth, then applies them to every piece of AI-generated content. The more your team creates with Claude, the more consistent your brand becomes.

plugins.name: common-room
plugins.description: Turn Common Room into your GTM copilot. Research accounts and contacts, prep for calls with attendee profiles and talking points, and draft personalized outreach across email, LinkedIn, and phone. Build targeted prospect lists, generate weekly briefings for every upcoming call, and create strategic account plans — all grounded in real signal data from product usage, engagement and intent signals, so every output reflects what's actually happening in your accounts.

plugins.name: slack-by-salesforce
plugins.description: Official Lark IM MCP server for interactive and collaborative workflows. Surface insights, draft messages, and engage teams directly within Lark IM from Claude Cowork.

plugins.name: zoom-plugin
plugins.description: Claude plugin for planning, building, and debugging Zoom integrations across REST APIs, SDKs, webhooks, bots, and MCP workflows.

plugins.name: lark-base-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy a production Lark Base end-to-end for your team — an 8-phase orchestrator (discovery → design → build → wire-up → import → dashboards → automation → verified handover) that fans out parallel sub-agents at build and viz.

plugins.name: daily-assistant
plugins.description: Run your day on Lark — morning brief, end-of-day digest, inbox & IM triage, task prioritization, focus mode, meeting prep, 1:1 prep, contact 360, calendar audit, and weekly review.

plugins.name: crm-sales
plugins.description: Run a CRM on Lark Base — weekly pipeline review, post-call deal updates from meeting minutes, and dormant-contact follow-up drafts. Drafts only; you approve every send.

plugins.name: governance
plugins.description: Govern Lark operations — triage the approval queue, measure approval-flow SLAs and bottlenecks, audit Drive/Doc/Wiki/Base permissions for risky exposure, and promote decisions from chat and minutes into a structured Base.

plugins.name: knowledge-docs
plugins.description: Author and maintain Lark knowledge — generate docs, wiki pages, and sheets from named templates, and audit a Wiki for stale, orphan, and duplicate pages with archive/merge/re-parent proposals.

plugins.name: delivery-eng
plugins.description: Engineering delivery rituals on Lark — build blameless incident postmortems from an on-call IM timeline, and draft end-of-sprint retros from closed tickets, velocity, and blockers.

plugins.name: lark-cli-dev
plugins.description: Build, debug, and extend the lark-cli MCP bridge (cmd/mcp/) — add and refine tools, run handshake smoke-tests, rebuild and reinstall the binary, and diagnose host disconnects. Operates on lark-cli source, not the runtime lark MCP server.
